entry.title: Re: S/4 Cloud: HowTo Change a user e-mail address
entry.content: Not sure if this post is still valid since now import happens using Manage Workforce instead of Import Business user and unfortunately this solution doesn't work anymore. Anyone has any suggestions?

entry.title: Re: unable to find valid certification path to requested...
entry.content:
If you are trying to connect from your Hybris instance to a service through HTTPS and getting this exception, then you need to export the SSL certificate from the server running the service and import it into your Java Keystore.

Export the the signed certificate from the server:

openssl s_client -connect <server>:<port> -showcerts

This will output the certificate details. Copy the section between:

-----BEGIN CERTIFICATE-----

and:

-----END CERTIFICATE-----

(including the BEGIN and END lines)

Save this block to a file, e.g. my-cert.pem.

Then import this file to your Java Keystore:

keytool -import -trustcacerts -alias my-cert -file /path/to/my-cert.pem -keystore <JAVA_HOME>/lib/security/cacerts

Restart your Hybris application, now it will be able to connect to the server.

You can refer to this article for more details on this procedure: How to Import Self-Signed Certificates into Java Keystore for Local Development.

entry.title: Re: Shell Plugin for Admin Site Portal- SCP
entry.content:
I realize I am too late for this but still I will answer this. I think I understand the problem you are facing.
Since you were previously using normal sandbox launchpad for plugins for your site shell plugin will work there because your syntax would probably be this I guess to add the buttons on header for both admin site template and normal sandbox flp template accordingly(example scenario). Hope this helps

rendererPromise.then(function (oRenderer) {
  var oRootControl=oRenderer.getRootControl()
  var oViewName=oRootControl.getProperty("viewName")
  //for adminsite template
  if(oViewName.includes('admin')){
    var oButton=new Button("headerEnd",{
      tooltip: "User",   
      icon: "sap-icon://person-placeholder",
      press: function (oEvent) {
        that._showUserPopup(oEvent)
      }  
    })    

    var oMenuIndex = oRootControl.toolHeader.getContent().findIndex(oControl => oControl.getId().includes("toolHeaderUserItem"));
    oRootControl.toolHeader.insertContent(oButton,oMenuIndex)              
  }else{  //for shell plugin template
   oRenderer.addHeaderEndItem({
     id: "headerEnd",
     tooltip: "User",
     icon: "sap-icon://person-placeholder",
     press: function (oEvent) {
      that._showUserPopup(oEvent);
     }
   }, true, false);
  }
});

entry.title: Re: TMS - Transport SAP Cloud Integration (CI/CPI) Content with Transport Management Service (TMS) a
entry.content:
@gauravi_shukla @TiaXu 
"First and foremost, I'd like to express my sincere gratitude for this insightful blog. We've successfully set up our CloudTMS for the Integration Suite landscape, and it has been running smoothly for almost a year now. In our case, we have the CAS and TMS running on one subaccount [TMS], while our DEVIS, QAIS, and PRODIS environments are managed across distinct subaccounts."

We have recently been introduced to a new Integration Suite landscape (for data sensitivity purposes) - [DEVHR/QAHR/PRODHR]. While I can see that all the destinations are configured correctly, I am encountering an issue with Destination 2 [CloudIntegration]. This destination currently points to our DEVIS, and according to the documentation, it must be named "CloudIntegration."

How can I establish this destination to point to the new IS tenant - DEVHR?

Please note, that we would prefer not to switch to the Content Agent UI at this time and would like to continue using our existing approach.

Is it possible to have two separate destinations for CloudIntegration [Destination 2], or would I need to host another CAS service on a separate subaccount (like DEVHR)?

Thanks,
Subhram

entry.title: ECC-EWM-GTS Export Declaration “Before PGI in EWM” -Bonded Warehouse
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

Good Day

I have below requirement, kindly share your valuable inputs to define the FCD process in BWH.

Standard behaviour : SO -> Del -> ODO- > PGI in EWM ->OD->ECC-Material document-> GTS Export declaration, in this scenario export declaration created in GTS has all the required data and there is no issue here.

I think when the PGI is done in EWM, material document created in ECC, hope that is the reference to GTS for doing the “Export declaration”

Required behaviour: SO -> Del - > ODO->Picking Complete-> “NO” PGI in EWM -> Export declaration in GTS

This is for Free Circulation stocks.

Is there any process, with which we can do the “Export declaration” before PGI in EWM?

This is due to operational challenges as after PGI immediately the shipment leaves the facility and with in which if the customs clearance (from duty unpaid to duty paid) is not received, it will be an issue.

And hence we want to keep the PGI as last step, ie. After export declaration process is completed, business wants to print some carrier labels and want to post the goods issue and then shipment leaves physically. This would give enough time for FCD  process to customs.

Note: Client system is on EWM Decentral 9.5 and ECC 6.0

Look forward for your valuable advise.

Thanks,

Hari.

 

@sapewm SAP Community @GTS

entry.title: Subscription Failed while creating SAP BAS Subscription

entry.title: Re: Stop Guessing! Use Case with Conversational AI Agents in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Brilliant Article @hannahhorvath 

It makes total sense to link AI Agents to SAP BPA and Joule Studio because Agents are much more than the evolution of RPA. If I want an Agent to support my x% of an AP process, I must teach how I do AP, which elements I use to validate the received goods, and the payment elements. All of that requires software and memory and must get better as it learns and adjusts. There is where RPA falls short, but AI Agents succeed.

I can't wait to access this framework.

entry.title: Re: BC SETs module PS (Project System)
entry.content: Okay, so no BC Set implied. It's the default data (table TCJ41) delivered by SAP. Most probably, your client (mandant) has been copied WITHOUT customizing data. Ask the administrators to delete it and copy it again from a client WITH customizing data. Note that the original customizing data is provided in the client 000.

entry.title: Application for Digital Skills Initative - Completed learnings, missed to post on Beginner Corner
entry.content:
Hi I am Basavaraj, Working as a Finance end user analyst and I am interested to switch my Career to SAP as I have almost spent 10+ years in Finance domain as a end user and not seeing any progress in my Career.

As a part of this SAP Digital Skill Initiative I have completed my Learning course before the End date and submitted the details of the learning completion screen shots along with User ID details to digitalskills@sap.com

However I have not received any redemption code to book my exam. I have received notifications post completion of learning on the course to take up the exam. 

Below are the details for your quick reference and validations - Please help to get the activation code as I have invested my time when this opportunity was launched and looking forward to start my new Journey with SAP.

SAP Community Username: BasavarajAnnigeri

email id - annigerib02@gmail.com
Course completed - and below exam its redirecting when I click on the view certification.
I am attaching screen shots for your reference.

entry.title: Re: dynamic title by date filter
entry.content:
Hi @DanielVisblut,

You can used below steps:

Steps to Use Dynamic Text with a Numeric Chart in SAC
1.Add a Numeric Chart

 

Drag and drop a Numeric Chart widget onto your canvas.
Bind it to the measure you want to display.
Example: Select Profit for the year 2014.
2.Add a Date Filter

3.Use it to filter the data displayed in the Numeric Chart.
Add Dynamic Text 

Right click in Numeric chart title text 

4.In the Dynamic Text configuration panel:
Select the Date Filter (or the filter you added in step 2).
SAC will automatically generate dynamic text based on the filter selection.
Display the Profit with the Selected Period

Position the Dynamic Text above or near your Numeric Chart.
The text will dynamically update to show the selected period from the Date Input Control (e.g., Profit for Jan 2014).

 

Select Date filter for Dynamic Text

5. In below screen shot you can see that if I changed the period Numeric chart title also change the period dynamically .

Here it show's profit of Mar2014 

It will change dynamically as per your selection.

 The text will dynamically update to show the selected period from the Date Input Control (e.g., Profit for June 2014).

Kindly upvote if you find this answer helpful.

 
 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: How to read contents of a file in RAP action

If the file you want to read is in xlsx format, you can use the XCO library to read the content.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-mass-upload-from-a-spreadsheet-file-into-an-sap-fiori-app-in-sap-btp/ba-p/13785946

entry.title: Re: Status profile creation and automatic status update

entry.title: SAP Cloud Identity Services - IPS ( How to Assign default groups and Unassign groups on Condition)
entry.content:
Managing user groups efficiently is crucial for maintaining security and ensuring that users have the appropriate access within your organization. SAP Cloud Identity Services, specifically the Identity Provisioning Service (IPS), offers robust capabilities to automate and streamline this process. In this blog post, we’ll explore how to assign default groups to users and unassign groups based on specific conditions using IPS Transformtion logic.

Below is the scenario or example

Assigning Default Groups

Assigning default groups to users can be essential for ensuring that active users have the necessary permissions from the moment they are onboarded or access to the certain applications.

Here’s a step-by-step guide to achieve this:

  1. Assign "DefaultGroup" in IPS Configuration:
    Navigate to the Identity Services - Identity Provisioning tab and to your Target System.
    Under the Transformation tab, modify according to your condition in transformation rule.

    Note : below JSON is sample with having 1 group

 

{
  "condition": "$.userType == 'employee'",
  "constant": "DefaultGroup",
  "targetPath": "$.groups[0].value"
}

 

Note : below JSON is sample which is good practice to define your multiple groups having Target Variable

 

            {
                "condition": "$.active == true",
                "constant": [
                    {
                        "id": "SAP Build Apps"
                    },
                    {
                        "id": "SAP Build Code"
                    }
                ],
                "targetVariable": "assignGroup"
            },
            {
                "condition": "$.active == false",
                "constant": [
                    {
                        "id": "SAP Build Apps"
                    },
                    {
                        "id": "SAP Build Code"
                    }
                ],
                "targetVariable": "unassignGroup"
            }

 

Apply the Transformation:

  • Save the transformation rule and apply
  • Go to the relevant source system.
  • Run the provisioning job to ensure that all active users are assigned to the default group upon creation/modification and Inactive Users are unassigned from the default group defined.

Best Practices

  • Regularly Review and Update Rules: Ensure that your transformation rules are up-to-date with your organization’s policies and structure.
  • Test in a Sandbox Environment: Before applying any new rules to your production environment, test them in a sandbox to avoid unintended access issues.
  • Monitor Provisioning Jobs: Regularly monitor the results of your provisioning jobs to ensure that groups are being assigned and unassigned as expected.

By leveraging the capabilities of SAP Cloud Identity Services - IPS, you can automate the management of user groups, ensuring that your users always have the appropriate access based on their roles and conditions. This not only enhances security but also improves operational efficiency.

entry.title: Re: API REST integration (new UI)
entry.content:
Hi, I too am facing issues and sadly haven't gotten any responses on here. However for your situation I'd like to help as best I can by showing you how I handle this for my workflow

 

Firstly you'd want to set up your Query parameters from within the Base Api menu. You can then refer to these parameters on all menus depending on when you need them.

As for the actual binding, I use the query.aditionalInputs Formula or select from the Data query on the left side within the formula input screen. I then add these paramaters within the Relative path and query to the URL using all the conventional syntax of the formula field (plus sign, string & variable notations etc..)

 

Additionally if you are using Firebase as a Database and your data lies within documents, you might need to specify this through the API response within the response mapper formula input i.e response.data.documents

There could also be something I missed or better ways to do a step I explained therefore I'm open to corrections but I hope you find your solution through this response!

While I'm here I would also like to take the chance to ask a question I had previously asked hopefully some passing readers might offer a solution. That being said I'm facing issues configuring a universal REST API Create request to my Firebase database using the POST method specifically with configuring the schema and testing it. I can't seem to add formulas anymore and it seems like the payload is Different compared to the old API REST integration UI. For the exact same Data Entity I configured in an older application with the older UI still available, I get no errors, however with this new UI I get "Invalid" payload

Has anyone managed to get this to work with Firebase or offer any solutions to this?

MfG

entry.title: Re: SAP CCO on Android Tablets or Mobiles.
entry.content:
Hi Ahmad,

We’re excited to share that we’ve successfully brought SAP Customer Checkout to Android! We have developed an APK that allows SAP CCO to operate seamlessly on Android tablets and smartphones, offering the same features and benefits as on other platforms. Best of all, no remote access is required - it works completely offline!

If you’d like to test this solution, we’d be happy to provide a test version. Contact us for further details!

info@checkout-peak.com


Feel free to check out our latest video on YouTube about this topic:
https://youtube.com/shorts/WxqS75axgU0?si=ryhrW2DZZtkB1caK

You can also find more details on our website:
https://checkout-peak.com/sap-customer-checkout-on-android/

Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or need further information!

Best Regards
Michael Bosch

entry.title: Native SQL question
entry.content:
Greeting from Aaron Lee who is a beginner of ABAP student. I meet a runtime error in the following codes which has no syntax error.

REPORT z3_4native_sql .

DATA: gv_carrid LIKE sflight-carrid VALUE 'AA',

gv_connid LIKE sflight-connid.

EXEC SQL.

SELECT A.CONNID

INTO :gv_connid

FROM SFLIGHT A

WHERE A.MANDT = :SY-MANDT AND A.CARRID = :gv_carrid.

ENDEXEC.

WRITE gv_connid.

Errors as following, How can I correct it？ Thanks

entry.title: Re: READ Method is not triggering for SAP RAP Service Read Web API Call
entry.content:
Remember

The GO button on the UI does not call the <method> FOR READ (the transactional READ) in the behavior pool. Instead, the GO button executes a query via the RAP runtime engine and reads data directly from the database.

The READ operation provides read access to the application buffer. It is used to retrieve data for further processing during the interaction phase. This is necessary, for example, for ETag comparison when executing an UPDATE

entry.title: SAP SAM4U Solution | License Reporting
entry.content:
Dear All,

SAM4U Introduction- 

SAP’s software asset manager tool SAM4U is a tailored solution that allows customers to analyze their license consumption compared to SAP license entitlement. It consolidates usage data from customers’ systems and considers data such as SAP user authorizations, SAP users' active use footprints, and information about developer users.

This can be implemented in any SAP S4HANA foundation platform. 

TCI package can be refereed from KBA# 3292019 - SAM4U Data Extractor 

 

Details Steps: 

Implementation Steps-

  1. Implement TCI note 3298562 implementations.
  2. Implement SAP notes 2706317 and 3292019

Post installation steps-

    • Create SAM4U Variant for ABAP Report /SAM4U/BTL_START_URL
    • Activate sicf service /sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sam4u/dashbrd/
    • Activate and Maintain Services odata service /SAM4U/BTL_CLIENT
    • Execute test Odata service
    • Create RFC Connection for Definition for Daemon Registration
    • Execute the program /SAM4U/BTL_DAEMON_MANAGER for Daemon Registration.
    • Daemon Registration for Auto Start Up

Backend system configuration-

  1. Configure RFC connection of type 3 to your SAP systems. 
  2. Create RFC user with access to execute "/SAM4U/BEX_ACTIVE_USE_ANALYSIS" along with S_TOOLS_EX authorization. 
  3. Obtain recent Authorization rule set by following note 3113382(check administration section of the guide for more detials "User Guide - SAM4U Tool-V2-L"
  4. Start SAM4U Fiori Application

We can analyze consolidated license consumption data from various SAP backend systems and compare it with current licensing information using one of the following methods:

  1. SAP users’ authorizations
  2. SAP active usage of the systems
  3. SAP manual users’ classification
  4. SAP Engines usage
  5. SAP HANA EE usage

entry.title: Re: In script hyphen is updating as hashtag
entry.content: In ABAP-based systems, characters are converted to # by default if the character doesn't exist in a given wrong Code Page. You have chosen a printer with a non-Unicode printer ("output device"). There are many existing questions and answers about this topic.

entry.title: Re: standard solution which can be utilized for exporting...
entry.content:
Hello

in top: to help you we need to know: do you use "R/3" or "S/4" and if S/4 which version (on premiise, pubic cloud; private cloud)

C.B.

entry.title: Problem with automatic check payment
entry.content:
Greetings Consultants,

The SAP system is not able to identify the checks for printing automatically & in sequence. I have to manually change the NR status of the check number in order to view them in the F110 programe. 

Please help, as this issue has been for about past two weeks, with no apparent solution.

Thanks & Regards,

Anuraag

entry.title: 2025 / What will come? Are we prepared?
entry.content:
Introduction

2025 will be a very interesting year. The new version of "Product Compliance" will come; more companies will start to move from R/3 to S/4 becasue of many reasons.

They will check: what is the best approach for the "migration" startign with EHS Classic. Select "greenfield", "brownfield" other approach?

And who can help me on the journey from R/3 to S/4? The capacity of most of the consulting companies are limited.

If i do not use "3E" content yet: is this now the right time to select "3E" as the content provider.

Details

Most of the companies are using this approach: they use a Wave approach to move from SAP system 1 to 2. In doing so: many of the try to look for "greenfield" and to ideally optimize the processes.

Experience has shown: one of the cirtical topics to look at is "EHS data migration". But how to migrate depends. Do you still use 3E? Do you plan to use 3E? Do you use "Inheritance" or "Referencing"?

Are you "close" to SAP Standard... or far away? How many user will be effected? How many material etc. etc. etc.

To make this a success: You need project management; and a lot of this.. but are you experienced in this? Can you get help?

Critical topics to look at

Because of the simplification: You need to check your current processes and try to map to the exsisting S/4 processes. Sometimes such a "mapping" is not possible (e.g. for "Waste Management"). But what is the alternative?

The other question might be; if i need to migrate form R/3 so S/4.. should i use "EHS Classic" or try to use "Product Compliance" to do the migration? and  is there yet any experience in the market for "Prodcut Compliance"? 

Therefore: try to go for "greenfield", discuss hard wth yur users, Using greenfiled you might not need to migrate customer specifiy programs or not so many of that.

But this is related: are you "close" to SAP Standard? If not: the challenge is big; and many companies have problems in "greenfield" thinking.

Keep in mind: a wave based migration does mean: for a certain period you will use the old landscape and the new landscape in parallel ; as a consequence: you msut do what is called "double maintenace".

Conclusion

Just start you migration. At some point in time: you must start any how (as R/3 is not supported endless).

Keep in mind: you are not alone. Anybody using currently R/3 must migrat to S/4 at some point in time.

And remember the "old days": may be you have successfully migrated from R/2 to R/3; or from R/3 Non Unicod to R/3 Unicode. Yes there might have been trouble.. but at the end: it was (hopfully a success).

So i wish you the best for 2025

C.B.

entry.title: Re: FileUploader SAPUI5 Version 1.103
entry.content: thanks!!! this Idea works fine for me, I don't need the files go directly to backed

entry.title: SAP Mobile Start
entry.content:
Dear All

I have activated SAP Start using booster and SAP Build Foundation Edition.

Destinations are also created and Roles are exposed to BTP but over SAP Build Site, No App is showing neither roles are appearing in Content Exposure Channel.

Any idea , how to enable Tiles over SAP Start.

entry.title: Data Extraction to BigQuery
entry.content:
We need to extract data from Trends and Campaign Analytics via an API or by adding the information to our BigQuery. Could you please assist us with this?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Data Extraction to BigQuery
entry.content:
For Campaign Analytics, there are a few different Open Data datasets that can be used. They can be checked at the document below:

  • Data views:: Email – Emarsys

It is also possible to extract this data using the API endpoints specified below:

  • Trend Reporting Summary | Emarsys Core API Reference
  • Bulk response summary | Emarsys Core API Reference

entry.title: Re: how to find all types of VL03N->Header Details->Conditions
entry.content: Hi Dominik. For deliveries the pricing procedure is assigned based on the delivery type here: SPRO-->Logistics Execution-->Shipping-->Basic Shipping Functions-->Pricing-->Define Pricing Procedure for Delivery

entry.title: Re: How to work with test cases and test plans in several...
entry.content: Hello Ebba, currently the test case is assigned to a specific scope within the project, and also scope cannot be changed within the test case. You can post a request in Influence program for implementation

entry.title: Re: Urgent: MDK V24.11 App Crashing on Android Devices
entry.content: Yes, 24.11.1 fixes the crash when pressing done on Android in the simple property field

entry.title: Re: SQL API Post Data Issue in MDK V24.11
entry.content: What platform are you working on (iOS, Android, Web)?

entry.title: Re: Cannot install Booster - SAP Integration Suite application is not subscribed.
entry.content:
I also encountered the same issue with Booster, but these steps helped me complete Step-4 from the "Set Up Integration Suite Trial" guide.

I'm glad I found this thread. It would be helpful if the "Set Up Integration Suite Trial" guide is updated with these steps or if the Booster issue can be resolved.

Thank you.

entry.title: How will we conduct the sampling procedure in the pharma and chemical industries?
entry.content:
How will we conduct the sampling procedure in the pharma and chemical industries?

For example, 100kg chemical we are purchasing in that we are taking 1 kg sample for inspection (incoming inspection), we have completed the inspection and we are doing UD, while the stock posting system automatically allows us to propose 99 kg Only.

In my case 99kg only we need to post into unrestricted use, as we already used 1 kg for inspection, that 1kg we can't re-use for production as it is a chemical product.

Is there a system that automatically calculates the balance QTY after taking the sample?sampling

For this scenario what kind of setting and where do I need to make it?

#pharma #chemical #QM #sampling

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Good Afternoon,

Our W2 vendor mentioned Employers are required to report amounts related to the NY Healthcare Worker Bonus program in box 14 of Form W-2.  I have not seen where a note has been released to provide the setup for this reporting on the form.  Our vendor mentioned they 'thought' the sample code could be 'NY HWB'.  Will/or has SAP released a note with this information and I have missed it? 

Has anyone set this up for 2024 reporting yet?

Juli

entry.title: How do we configure sampling procedures for pharma?
entry.content:
How do we configure sampling procedures for pharma?

For example, I have 5 characteristics in my inspection plan each MIC needs a different sample while doing the inspection, eg 10kg materials received from the vendor I need to do an incoming inspection for all the 5 MIC I need 180grm (40, 40, 40, 30, 30) sample required. sometimes businesses won't do all the MIC inspections one or two MIC businesses will skip which means 120grm (40, 40, 40) is only required, in this scenario how we can plan the sampling procedure?

1) Is there any manual sampling procedure available in standard SAP?

2) and the next question is for the same scenario while doing UD from the 10kg we have already taken 180 or 120 grm as a sample then the system automatically calculates the balance QTY (9.820kg or 9.880kg) to post in unrestricted use.

For this scenario what kind of configuration do I need to make it?

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Podcast - Episode 19 - Wave Management with SAP EWM
entry.content:
Wave Management is critical piece in EWM enable efficient operations in the warehouse. 

From AI vision perspective in Wave Management, it would help

  1. Is it possible to build AI Model or Machine Learning to analyze historical order patterns, and resource availability?
  2. Is there any to find real-time anomaly detection by flagging potential issues early for manual intervention?

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Analytics Average Calculation
entry.content: Hi @Yogeshwar_M Can you please explain how you created the chart from the table. Thanks

entry.title: Building Blocks of Innovation: Creating CAP Applications on SAP BTP
entry.content:
This blog aims to provide guidance for all ABAP developers on creating a CAP application, along with a fundamental understanding of SAP BTP.

 BTP:

SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) is a cloud-based platform designed to improve SAP applications. SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP) brings together application development and automation, data and analytics, integration, and AI capabilities in one unified environment.

 

SAP BTP Environments: 

  • In SAP BTP, “Environments” are like Platform-as-a-Service spaces.

  • They help us build, run, and manage applications and services.
  •  Think of BTP environments as different playgrounds, each made for specific tasks and technologies, providing the right space for different types of software work.

Each environment in SAP BTP provides the specific tools, technologies, and runtimes needed to build applications.

  • SAP BTP offers three main environments: Cloud Foundry, ABAP, and Kyma. There’s also another environment called Neo, but it’s being phased out.
  • In SAP BTP, an “environment” is like a digital workspace where you can create and run different types of software applications.

Think of it as having different rooms in a house for various tasks:

  • One room for building web apps (like Cloud Foundry)
  • Another room for working closely with SAP systems (like ABAP)
  • And another room for creating small, interconnected software pieces (like Kyma).
    ( Kyma is a cloud-based platform that combines Kubernetes with tools and open-source components to help develop, run, and manage secure, scalable cloud-native applications. )

Each environment is designed with the right tools and resources for different kinds of software projects, so businesses can easily pick the best fit for their needs within SAP BTP.

Cloud Foundry Environment (2017):

  • Think of this as a space for building modern, cloud-based applications. It’s like a workshop where you can create web and mobile apps using popular programming languages and tools. This environment is perfect for developers who want to build flexible and scalable software that runs on the internet.
  • Cloud Foundry includes the SAP BTP Cloud Foundry runtime service, which is based on an open-source platform managed by the Cloud Foundry Foundation. It allows you to build new business apps and services, supporting multiple programming languages, libraries, and services.

Example use-case:

You could use the Cloud Foundry environment to build a web app with Node.js or the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model. The app could connect to an SAP HANA database to pull and display real-time sales data.

ABAP Environment (2018):

  • SAP added the ABAP Environment to SAP BTP, known as SAP BTP ABAP Environment or “Steampunk.”
  • This environment is based on the latest version of the ABAP platform used in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.
  • It supports the ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model, which includes SAP Fiori and Core Data Services (CDS).
  • The ABAP environment can also connect with other SAP BTP services, like SAP Destination service, SAP Build Work Zone, SAP Workflow Management, and SAP Interactive Forms by Adobe.

Example use-case:

You can use the ABAP environment to create custom reports or build extensions for SAP S/4HANA, such as a specialized app for processing sales orders.

Kyma Environment (2020):

  • The Kyma environment is a fully managed Kubernetes runtime based on the open-source project “Kyma.” Kubernetes is the core technology behind Kyma, and Kyma adds extra features to make it more powerful.
  • Kyma combines Kubernetes with a set of top-notch tools and open-source projects, helping developers build, run, and manage secure and scalable cloud applications.
  • Kyma offers additional features like Serverless, Eventing, Observability, Security, Service Mesh, and Application Connectivity.
  •  It can integrate with other SAP services and products, like SAP BTP, SAP S/4HANA, and SAP SuccessFactors.
  • With Kyma, there’s no need to worry about infrastructure management or maintenance, freeing up developers to focus on building applications.

Neo Environment – Phasing Out in 2028:
·       The Neo environment has been around since 2012 and is the oldest SAP BTP environment.
·        However, it no longer offers the best technology for building cloud solutions. Cloud Foundry, ABAP, and Kyma now cover all the use cases Neo once did.
·        SAP has announced that the Neo environment will be phased out on December 31, 2028, depending on customer or partner contracts.

History of SAP BTP:

2012 - SAP entered the PaaS market with SAP NetWeaver Cloud, initially code-named “Neo” (short for NetWeaver On-Demand).

2013 - SAP NetWeaver Cloud was rebranded as SAP HANA Cloud Platform.

2017 - The Cloud Foundry environment was integrated alongside Neo.

2017 - The “HANA” branding was dropped, and the platform was renamed SAP Cloud Platform.

2018 - The ABAP environment was introduced within SAP Cloud Platform.

2020 - The Kyma environment was added to SAP Cloud Platform.

2021 - SAP Cloud Platform was retired, and the new brand, SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), was launched.

Introduction to Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP):

The SAP Cloud Application Programming Model is a set of tools and resources that helps developers create strong business applications. It shows them the best ways to do things, making it easier to follow proven methods. This means they spend less time on repetitive tasks and can focus more on solving their specific problems. The model uses popular open-source tools.

As previously mentioned, the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model includes various tools, languages, and libraries that assist in creating high-quality business services and applications. Here are some key components:

  • Business Application Studio
  • Core Data Services (CDS)
  • REST OData
  • SAP Fiori
  • SAP HANA
  • Java
  • Node.js
  • Eclipse VS Code CLI

In the realm of design principles, there exists a concept that is both flexible and subjective. It is flexible as it allows for a variety of choices. You have the freedom to select the technology you wish to employ, determine your architectural pattern, and choose the components of the programming model that align best with your development requirements.

Front Ends:

  • SAP Fiori
  • Angular
  • React
  • Vue

Toolsets:

  • SAP Business Application Studio
  • Eclipse
  • VS Code

Data Sources:

  • SAP HANA
  • SQLite

Environments:

  • Cloud Foundry
  • Kubernetes
  • XSA
  • Local

Note: Before creating application we need to install package for CDS in BAS

Steps to create Cap Application:

  • Create a account in BTP Cockpit
  • Click on Trail Home

  • Click SAP Business Application Studio

  • Open BAS Application
  • Login to BTP Account
  • Click on Dev i.e., Development Space

  • Click on menu and select Terminal and open new terminal

  • Type command cds init Employee_app

  • Now employee app is successfully created

  • Create a file in DB folder data-model.cds  

  • Should give unique name ex: cap_app1
  • Creating a entity called Employee

  • Now we need to expose the created data-model using service
  • Create a file in SRV cat-service.cds

  • We are now creating OData service

  • Now we need to install node module npm install

  • Build the cds using cds build

  • To run the application use command cds watch

  • Now you can check the metadata

  • In DB folder create a folder “data”

  • Create a CSV file for the data to the application
  • CSV file name should be according to namespace + Entity

cap_app1-Employee.csv


 

Please feel free to share your thoughts in the comments section below.

If you enjoyed reading this blog post about Clean ABAP and would like to receive similar content in the future, please consider following my profile. By following my profile gaddamarunkumarreddy , you will receive updates on new blog posts and other content related to ABAP development best practices.

Follow the SAP ABAP environment Topic page: SAP ABAP

This page is a great resource for staying up-to-date on the latest news and developments in the SAP HANA environment. You can follow the page to receive updates, post and answer questions, and read other posts on the topic

If you have any queries related to SAP and ABAP Developments you can post here https://answers.sap.com/tags/73554900100700000996, you can also find many topics related to your query.

entry.title: Re: Insufficient Resources Error while deploying in CF (BTP Trial)
entry.content: Yesterday afternoon it was working again, failing again today! Not sure what is going on with the BTP Trial infrastructure but it doesn't look stable.

entry.title: Re: Custom Field not available in SAP Standart ODATA API...
entry.content:
Use the Custom Fields app to extend your STD Odata service.
Check out this SAP Document - Extend your OData V4 service Billing Document (API_BillingDocument) 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/03c04db2a7434731b7fe21dca77440da/21ac6417b0194606adc3456b1d7ea3f9.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Hide Facet conditionally in fiori elemetns
entry.content:
@ui.hidden can be filled with a dynamic value as follows:  @ui.hidden: #(<boolean_fieldname_in_cds>)

So a hashtag, open braket, fill in your field name that is dynamic (ie a virtual element, or just another field from your data-source...) close braket.

The field that is mentioned must, of course, be a boolean!
Hope this helps anyone looking for the concrete code to get this working.

entry.title: What is the difference between "Sales Deal & Promotions" and regular condition record discount?
entry.content:
Hello Guys,

My question is, What is the difference between "Sales Deal & Promotions" and regular condition record for discount?

As I understand Sales Deals are being tracked by condition records too. We can simply create a discount by creation condition record for particular product/product line. So why do we need to create a Sales Promotion&Deal instead of just creating a discount from VK11?

What is the efficiency of this?

entry.title: Re: Not Able Connect Data Services Designer To Remote Ser...
entry.content: I had this happen as well and in the end it turned out to be that my profile on the machine was corrupted. Once IT and I deleted my profile and I rebuilt it, Data Services Designer launched just fine.

entry.title: Starting the Telco Accelerator recipe. Error when adding to the cart
entry.content:

It seems to be working fine, but when adding products to the cart, I get the following error on the browser console: "Process type cannot be empty", type: "CommerceCartModificationError".

When starting a recipe, I cannot debug. Could someone help me understand why this error is being returned?

Thank you. Best regards

entry.title: Re: Starting the Telco Accelerator recipe. Error when add...
entry.content: I think I skipped a step during the installation. I'll try again tomorrow.

entry.title: RDARCH_ARCHIVE_DATA_SOLMANの必要性
entry.content:
の必要性RDARCH_ARCHIVE_DATA_SOLMAN
SOLMAN_EWA_ADMINで保持期間に設定されているものについて、保持期間が過ぎたものは自動でアーカイブされるとのことですが、レポート"RDARCH_ARCHIVE_DATA_SOLMAN"は特に利用する必要はないのでしょうか？
自動アーカイブとの違いがイマイチ理解できていないので教えて頂けると幸いです。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: RDARCH_ARCHIVE_DATA_SOLMANの必要性
entry.content:
SOLMAN_EWA_ADMINの保持期間を設定すれば、保持期間が過ぎたセッションは「Closed」になります。
RDARCH_ARCHIVE_DATA_SOLMANはアーカイブを処理するレポートです。
RDARCH_ARCHIVE_DATA_SOLMANを使用し、その中の一つのオプション「Only From Repository」を使用する場合、全て「Closed」セッションを対象にします。
「Closed」セッションはSOLMAN_EWA_ADMINの保持期間の設定によります。

RDARCH_ARCHIVE_DATA_SOLMANとSOLMAN_EWA_ADMINの関連性の詳細は以下のSAPノートい記載されております。ご参照いただければと存じます。
2075483 - EarlyWatch Alert Archiving 

＝＞If you need to keep available your EWAs for a certain time, set up their retention time by transaction SOLMAN_EWA_ADMIN. Be aware that retention time equal zero means that EWAs will always be available in your Solution Manager system and will never be closed.
Schedule weekly job SM:ARCHIVE SESSIONS AND DOCS, which runs report RDARCH_ARCHIVE_DATA_SOLMAN. If it runs with default parameters, such a report archives all the closed sessions, laying on the archive queue (done by option "Only From Repository"), older than 90 days, and their documents 

Option to run RDARCH_ARCHIVE_DATA_SOLMAN: 
Only From Repository - "Repository" indicates the archive queue in which closed sessions can be retrieved. As consequence, this option processes only the closed sessions. For this option the parameter "Days" is influent as the session closure depends on the "Retention Time" set by both transaction SOLMAN_EWA_ADMIN

entry.title: Re: Profitability report by the Profit center group

entry.title: Custom fields, default values using screen persona in s4 hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts, we are working on screen persona in S4 Hana Public Cloud. Here are few queries that we are facing

1. Is there any way we can default values like in VA01 screen set delivery block/billing block or anything that can be fixed for screen flavor

2. In some cases, e.g. for product master we have custom field extension possible using Manage Product app whereas that same custom field is not available in MM01/MM02/MM03. Is there any way to add this using screen persona?

3. Screen field validation - Is there any way to validate values entered on screen for a flavor without going for custom logic enhancements?

entry.title: Re: open same reports with different parameter values
entry.content:
Hi Don

 

Thank for your detailed answer

I'm aware of the fact that Cr for Enterprise is going away but just trying to solve my issue for the meanwhile
I'm not using any SDK in my report, it's a simple parameter and it works fine when I open it each time with different vale

The only issue is when I try to open it in different tabs at the same time

I have an HTML pre-load page that my users use to open my report and the just return to it and select the same report again with different vale, so it tries to open the same report on different tab and as you mentioned it is most probably the same instance, so it get's confused.
What do you mean by "unless you can prompt per use" how can I achieve that in CR?

Thanks again

Shlomi

entry.title: SAP BTP Document Upload
entry.content:
Greetings, 

I'm trying to upload document and store them into SQL DB using SAP CPI. 

I already created the logic as follows:
Pick files > Upload files > Set data variable > Create record
I also did the integration part using REST API and linked it to CPI. 

CPI is receiving a record but no file. It is receiving what I put in set data variable (name, path, size and mimeType). 

I missing some key data that would send the file itself to CPI. 

Has anyone worked in creating file upload record in SQL DB? If so what would be the right approach?

entry.title: Re: In script hyphen is updating as hashtag
entry.content: Do you mean you see # right after editing an SAP Script Form, or SAP Script Text, in the SAP Script "PC Editor" (or another editor?), before printing it? Even this question has been asked and answered (MS Word editor). https://www.google.com/search?q=sap+script+editor+hashtag%20site:sap.com

entry.title: Introducing SAP Kyma runtime dynamic credentials with HCP Terraform
entry.content:
Terraform stories. SAP Kyma runtime dynamic credentials with HCP Terraform

HCP Terraform is available as a hosted service at https://app.terraform.io. 
It can be used as an OIDC identity provider with your SAP BTP, Kyma runtime kubernetes clusters

Dynamic Credentials with the Kubernetes and Helm providers

HCP Terraform already supports dynamic credentials with Kubernetes in AWS and GCP.  And I have extended this support to SAP BTP, Kyma runtime clusters.

Let's see how...

Spoiler
https://dev.to/quovadis/terraform-stories-5deh

entry.title: Project WBS for CAPEX Budget Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Since SAP Public Cloud does not have internal orders, the capital expenditure process, which usually uses the internal order budget feature, now utilizes the WBS budget. However, during testing, the WBS budget could not control the budget even though postings to the asset were made. Does this mean the capital expenditure budget feature is no longer available in SAP Public Cloud? Below are the steps we have taken.

  1. Create WBS using Project control Enterprise project

 

  1. Release Project

 

  1. Input budget with apps manage budget document

100000024

 

  1. Project Budget Report

 

Butget already read in system, available for $ 6000

 

  1. Create Fixed Asset AUC

 

Already input WBS Element number as budget code

  1. Create PO and GR

PO Number 4500000118

 

As capture, asset number and WBS element already assigned, when GR also journal can created correctly

 

  1. Also create individual asset acquisition for asset 40000015

 

 

 

  1. Check on Project budget , our budget available still same, not reduce value of this transaction

 

Please help for budget capital expenditure solution on SAP Public Cloud 2408

entry.title: Long term planning
entry.content: My long term planning requirements are impacting the current requirement plan even after selecting stimulation mode. Please advise if someone knows how to fix this.

entry.title: Re: Data not refelcting in budget / planning version afte...
entry.content: thank you, resolved

entry.title: Re: input control not showing data until switching pages
entry.content:
resolved.

the problem was that the input control was cross calculation input control, the needs a table with cross calc. to load. 

resolved by adding a table and hiding it.

entry.title: SAP GUI Scripting with python to automatically download pdf files use CV04N
entry.content:
Hello experts:
I am now using SAP GUI Scripting to automatically download documents, using transaction code CV04N.

The script has been written by Python, but it needs to be optimized.

Here is the script:

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

import win32com.client
import time
import pyautogui
import pandas as pd

# set path
file_path = r"C:\Users\Administrator\Desktop\testt\document_codes.xlsx"

# read Excel 
df = pd.read_excel(file_path, engine='openpyxl')
document_codes = df['DocumentCode'].tolist() 

try:
# Connect to SAP GUI
sap_gui_auto = win32com.client.GetObject("SAPGUI")
application = sap_gui_auto.GetScriptingEngine
connection = application.Children(0)
session = connection.Children(0)

# print(f"Connected to SAP session: {session.Info.SystemName}")

# Start CV04N
session.StartTransaction("CV04N")
# print("Navigated to transaction CV04N")

for document_code in document_codes:
try:
# Input document code
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsMAINSTRIP/tabpTAB1/ssubSUBSCRN:SAPLCV100:0401/subSCR_MAIN:SAPLCV100:0402/ctxtSTDOKNR-LOW").text = document_code
time.sleep(1)

# Search
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[1]/btn[8]").press()
print(f"Document code {document_code} posted.")
time.sleep(5) # Waiting for server

# Open Display Document: Basic Data Engin
session.findById("wnd[0]").sendVKey(45)
# print("Show Info.")
time.sleep(5)


session.findById("wnd[0]").maximize()
time.sleep(1)

# Save as
pyautogui.hotkey('shift', 'f7', interval=0.5)
# print("Shift + F7 pressed successfully.")
time.sleep(3)


pyautogui.hotkey('enter', interval=0.5)
# print("Enter key pressed successfully.")

time.sleep(10)
print("Document Saved Successfully.")

# Back to CV04N:Find Document: Select Criteria
# print("Returning to CV04N interface for the next document.")
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[15]").press()
# Press Back button


time.sleep(2)
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[15]").press()
# Press Back button

except Exception as e:
print(f"Error processing document {document_code}: {e}")
continue

except Exception as e:
print("Error during SAP automation:", e)

------------------------------------------------------------

 

When the document is downloaded, press Back button to return to the Find Document: Select Criteria interface and enter another document code to download.As shown below

However, due to server delays, I am not sure when the download will be completed, so using time.sleep() will cause problems.

Later, I found that when the file is downloaded, the GuiStatusbar will prompt "*** bytes passed", and double-click this text, open another window, it shows "Message no. FES034".

 

Can I detect this Message code to determine that the document has been downloaded, so as to perform the Back operation,so I don't have to use time.sleep(). If so, how to write the code?

Or are there other detection methods to reduce the use of all time.sleeep() in the program?

Please help me, experts, thanks!

entry.title: Re: LSMW - create equipment with class/characterisctic assign
entry.content:
Hi 

i am following the same process for FLOC in my case i have RECORDNAME in each file and program ran successfully without any error, but still no class and char assign to FLOC below the screen shot

i not sure where i am going wrong.
